title: ShatterLib | OctoLib
description: Collection of shared code for OctoStudios' mods
body:
![MOD LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/rxfLjS0.png)


Collection of shared code for OctoStudios' mods. List of currently implemented features:
- Datapack-like YAML-based config with auto-validation, deep searialization and other safety features.


**NOTE:**
- From 1.20.1 to 1.21.11 requires [**ArchitecturyAPI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) to work!


It's not recommended to use this mod if you're a mod developer, since codebase of this API may change a lot sometimes, but you still can do so if you want~


***
![MOD ART](https://i.imgur.com/7Thcq1K.png)
***
**WANT TO TRY OUT OUR OTHER MODS? - VISIT OCTO-STUDIOS.COM FOR MORE INFO!**
